praise: High storage capacity of 3,032Wh for extended use
Versatile port selection including 60W USB-C Power Delivery
Includes a 2,000W AC pure sine wave inverter with 3,500W surge
Integration with Yeti App 3.0 for remote power monitoring
Mobile design featuring an included heavy-duty roll cart
Regulated 12V output for consistent power to sensitive electronics
Compatibility with multiple solar lines including Nomad and Boulder
Quiet operation suitable for indoor and campsite use
Ability to integrate into home circuits via a transfer switch kit
friction: Heavy unit weight of approximately 69.8 lbs complicates lifting
Reports of units failing to accept charges from wall or solar inputs
Limited battery lifespan rated at 500 cycles to 80% capacity
Long charging times of 14 hours using the standard 230W wall charger
Reports of firmware updates becoming stuck in progress loops
Short shelf life requiring recharges every 3 to 6 months
High price point relative to competing models with similar capacity
Only two AC outlets despite the high inverter capacity
Inadequate internal ventilation can lead to heat-related damage
Reports of inconsistent customer service experiences for out-of-warranty units
themes: Integration within a broader power ecosystem
